_notes: Source: AU Core Patient (Australian realm). Target: R4 base Patient. AU Core is significantly more constrained: root error constraints, AU-specific extensions, mandatory identifier slicing with AU identifier types (IHI/Medicare/DVA), mandatory name with error constraint and sub-element MS, mandatory gender, mandatory birthDate, and various MS elements. Going source→target (R4 base), all AU-specific constraints relax or disappear.

drifts.description: Source root constraints removed in target: AU Core defines au-core-pat-01(error), au-core-pat-02(error), and inv-pat-0 through inv-pat-5 constraints; R4 base Patient has no equivalent root constraints.
Extension birthPlace removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:birthPlace (optional, non-MS); R4 base defines no extension slices.
Optional AU extension indigenousStatus[mustSupport=true] removed in target: R4 base defines no AU-specific extensions. MS removed on optional element.
Optional AU extension genderIdentity[mustSupport=true] removed in target: R4 base defines no extensions in its differential. MS removed on optional element.
Optional AU extension individualPronouns[mustSupport=true] removed in target: R4 base defines no extensions in its differential. MS removed on optional element.
Extension veteranStatus removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:veteranStatus (optional, non-MS); R4 base defines no extension slices.
Extension closingTheGapRegistration removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:closingTheGapRegistration (optional, non-MS); R4 base defines no extension slices.
Extension mothersMaidenName removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:mothersMaidenName (optional, non-MS); R4 base defines no extension slices.
Extension interpreterRequired removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:interpreterRequired (optional, non-MS); R4 base defines no extension slices.
Extension dateOfArrival removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:dateOfArrival (optional, non-MS); R4 base defines no extension slices.
Extension recordedSexOrGender removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.extension:recordedSexOrGender (optional, non-MS); R4 base defines no extension slices.
identifier slicing removed in target: source AU Core defines pattern:type discriminator slicing on identifier; R4 base has no slicing on identifier.

identifier type profile changed: source AU Core allows AU-specific identifier profiles (au-ihi, au-medicarecardnumber, au-dvanumber, au-healthcarecardnumber, au-pensionerconcessioncardnumber, au-cwlthseniorshealthcardnumber, au-medicalrecordnumber, au-insurancemembernumber) in addition to base Identifier; target R4 base uses base Identifier only.
identifier:ihi AU slice [max=1, mustSupport=true, types=Identifier[au-ihi]] removed in target: R4 base has no identifier slicing.
identifier:medicare AU slice [max=1, mustSupport=true, types=Identifier[au-medicarecardnumber]] removed in target: R4 base has no identifier slicing.
identifier:dva AU slice [max=1, mustSupport=true, types=Identifier[au-dvanumber]] removed in target: R4 base has no identifier slicing.
identifier cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [min=0]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
identifier MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on identifier.

Source constraint au-core-pat-03(error) on name removed in target: AU Core defines an error constraint requiring name to contain at least one of family or given when present; R4 base has no constraint on name.
name cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [min=0]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
name MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on name.
name.use MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on name.use.
name.text MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on name.text.
name.family MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on name.family.
name.given MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on name.given.
telecom MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on telecom.
gender cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [min=0]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
gender MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on gender.
birthDate cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [min=0]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
birthDate MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on birthDate.
address MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on address.
address type profile changed: source AU Core uses au-address profile (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/StructureDefinition/au-address) on address; target R4 base uses base Address only.

contact.relationship binding changed: source extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/contact-relationship-type-3) [AU contact relationship type VS] → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/patient-contactrelationship) [R4 base VS]. Same binding strength, AU-specific VS replaced by R4 base VS.
contact.address type profile changed: source AU Core uses au-address profile (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/StructureDefinition/au-address) on contact.address; target R4 base uses base Address only.
communication MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on communication.
communication.language MustSupport removed on a required element (R4 base defines min=1 on communication.language): source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on communication.language.

communication.language binding changed: source AU Core has extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/common-languages-australia-2) [AU common languages VS] → target R4 base has preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages) [R4 languages VS]. Binding strength changed from extensible to preferred, and AU-specific VS replaced by R4 base VS.
communication.preferred MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport on communication.preferred.

birthDate sub-extension accuracyIndicator removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.birthDate.extension:accuracyIndicator (au-date-accuracy-indicator profile, optional, non-MS); R4 base has no such sub-extension.
birthDate sub-extension birthTime removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.birthDate.extension:birthTime (patient-birthTime profile, optional, non-MS); R4 base has no birthTime sub-extension.

deceased sub-extension accuracyIndicator removed in target: AU Core defines Patient.deceased[x]:deceasedDateTime.extension:accuracyIndicator (au-date-accuracy-indicator profile, optional, non-MS); R4 base has no such sub-extension.
